title: Facebook
memory: The previous action to navigate to Facebook Marketplace was successful. I have now initiated an extraction to document the page layout, results, filters, and any potential blockers as requested.

extract.query:

2. Structure of listing cards (elements included like price, title, location)
3. Price display format and location on card

5. Available filters or sorting options
